name: backend
description: Project Pixel DIP Lab Backend Engine

scripts.postinstall: pip install --break-system-packages -r requirements.txt || pip3 install --break-system-packages -r requirements.txt || python3 -m pip install --break-system-packages -r requirements.txt || pip install --user -r requirements.txt || pip3 install --user -r requirements.txt || pip install -r requirements.txt || pip3 install -r requirements.txt
